0 0.0 0.0 "depot"
1 288.0 2493.0 "product aisle 6 bloc 1 rank 172"
2 624.0 313.0 "product aisle 13 bloc 0 rank 25"
3 768.0 248.0 "product aisle 16 bloc 0 rank 15"
